decisions.title: Performance Concerns Identified
decisions.detail: There are identified concerns regarding the performance of the Horizon Dashboard project.

evidence.quote: there are some concerns about performance.

decisions.title: Consider Better Database
decisions.detail: It was suggested that a better database should probably be used at some point for the project.

evidence.quote: Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.

decisions.title: UI Design Improvement Required
decisions.detail: The User Interface of the dashboard needs to be improved to look nicer.

evidence.quote: The UI needs to look nicer.

decisions.title: Current UI Design is Unsatisfactory
decisions.detail: The team agreed that the current design of the UI is not good.

evidence.quote: We all agreed the current design isn't great.

decisions.title: Timelines Undecided
decisions.detail: Discussions were held regarding project timelines, but no firm decisions were made.

evidence.quote: There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.

decisions.title: Potential CRM System Integration
decisions.detail: There might be a future need to integrate the project with the CRM system.

evidence.quote: We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually

decisions.title: CRM Integration Details Unknown
decisions.detail: The specific timing and method for integrating with the CRM system are currently unknown.

evidence.quote: but we're not sure when or how.

decisions.title: Budget is a Concern
decisions.detail: Budget was briefly mentioned and identified as a concern for the project.

evidence.quote: Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern

decisions.title: Budget Numbers Required
decisions.detail: Although budget is a concern, no specific financial numbers were shared during the meeting, indicating a need for this information.

decisions.title: More Thorough Testing Recommended
decisions.detail: The team lead hinted that the testing process for the project should be more thorough.

evidence.quote: The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.

decisions.title: Improved Documentation Needed
decisions.detail: It was suggested that documentation practices should be improved moving forward.

evidence.quote: We should probably document things better going forward.

implementation_scope: Re-design and implement the user interface (UI) of the Horizon Dashboard (D003, D004)
Investigate and prepare for potential future integration with the CRM system (inferred_needs_confirmation) (D006)

constraints.text: Address identified performance concerns for the Horizon Dashboard project (D001)

architectural_decisions.text: Consider migrating to a better database (inferred_needs_confirmation) (D002)

open_technical_questions: Determine the technical method and timing for CRM system integration, assuming D006 (Potential CRM System Integration) is confirmed (D007)

acceptance_criteria: The Horizon Dashboard UI components and overall layout shall conform to the approved design specifications.
Performance metrics for the Horizon Dashboard (e.g., page load times, API response times, concurrent user capacity) shall meet defined thresholds.
All confirmed functional requirements shall have associated test cases covering both happy path and common failure path scenarios.
test_scenarios: Verify that all visible UI elements, including navigation, forms, and data display components, render according to the new design specifications across supported browsers and devices.
Verify that user interactions with the new UI (e.g., clicking buttons, submitting forms, filtering data) are responsive and visually consistent with the new design.
Verify that the dashboard loads within acceptable timeframes under typical user load.
Verify that key data operations (e.g., fetching, updating) complete within acceptable response times when the dashboard is under moderate to high load.
edge_cases: Test the UI rendering and responsiveness with various data volumes, including empty states, minimal data, and maximum expected data.
Test dashboard performance when a large number of concurrent users access and interact with the system simultaneously.
Test UI behavior and visual consistency on unsupported browser versions or highly unusual screen resolutions to ensure graceful degradation.
Test error messages and feedback mechanisms for design consistency and clarity when unexpected data or system errors occur.
unresolved_behaviors: What are the specific quantitative performance metrics (e.g., target load times, API response times, user concurrency limits) that need to be met for the Horizon Dashboard?
Where are the approved new UI design specifications located, and which specific aspects of 'nicer' are prioritized (e.g., color palette, layout, responsiveness, accessibility)?
Is CRM system integration a confirmed future requirement for the Horizon Dashboard, and if so, what are the timelines and preliminary scope for this integration?
What specific areas of 'more thorough testing' are expected, such as increased automation coverage, specific types of testing (e.g., security, accessibility), or extended manual test cycles?
What are the new documentation standards or requirements, and for which artifacts (e.g., user guides, API docs, test plans, design docs)?

decision_history: The team unanimously agreed that the current UI design of the Horizon Dashboard is unsatisfactory, driving the confirmed need for significant improvements to enhance its visual appeal.
dependencies: (Inferred) Dependence on identifying and potentially implementing a more suitable database solution to address performance concerns.
Potential future integration with CRM system (inferred, needs confirmation on scope, timing, and method).
risks: Performance concerns identified for the Horizon Dashboard project. (Likelihood: Confirmed, Impact: High)
Budget identified as a concern for the project. (Likelihood: Confirmed, Impact: High)
Inferred risk: Current database may be inadequate, potentially impacting performance, stability, and scalability. (Likelihood: Medium, Impact: High) - needs confirmation.
Inferred risk: Current testing practices may not be thorough enough, potentially leading to quality issues and rework. (Likelihood: Medium, Impact: Medium) - needs confirmation.
alignment_gaps: Project timelines were discussed but no firm decisions were made, indicating a significant gap in stakeholder alignment on delivery expectations and schedule.
Uncertainty around the scope, priority, and timing of potential CRM system integration suggests a gap in future functional roadmap and integration strategy alignment.
The hint about needing 'more thorough testing' implies potential misalignment among stakeholders or the team on current quality assurance expectations and processes.
open_questions: What are the confirmed timelines for the Horizon Dashboard project, including key phases and delivery dates? (High impact)
What are the specific financial numbers and budget formally allocated for the Horizon Dashboard project? (High impact)
Is CRM system integration a confirmed scope item for the project, and if so, what is its priority, expected timeline, and high-level integration method? (High impact)
Should the project's testing process be formally reviewed and improved to ensure thoroughness and meet quality standards? (Medium impact)
Should a formal process for improved documentation practices be established and implemented across the project team moving forward? (Low impact)

system_requirements: The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL provide a user interface with an improved aesthetic design, addressing current unsatisfactory aspects (D003, D004).
The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL be designed to meet identified performance concerns (inferred from D001 — specific metrics and targets need confirmation).
The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL be capable of integrating with the CRM system (inferred from D006 — scope and timing needs confirmation).
The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL be developed and maintained with thorough testing practices (inferred from D010 — specific testing types/coverage needs confirmation).
The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL be accompanied by improved technical documentation (inferred from D011 — scope and content needs confirmation).
data_flows: Potential data flow from the Horizon Dashboard to the CRM system for future integration (D006).
Potential data flow from the CRM system to the Horizon Dashboard for future integration (D006).
interface_contracts: Definition of API/interface specifications for the potential integration between the Horizon Dashboard and the CRM system (D006, D007).

constraints.text: The Horizon Dashboard project is subject to budget concerns, which must be considered in system design and implementation choices (D008).
The Horizon Dashboard system must address identified performance concerns (D001), implying a non-functional constraint on system response times, throughput, and/or resource utilization.

open_analysis_questions: What are the specific data elements, directionality, frequency, authentication methods, and error handling mechanisms required for the potential integration between the Horizon Dashboard and the CRM system (D006, D007)?

What are the specific performance metrics (e.g., response time, throughput, resource utilization, concurrency) and their target values for the Horizon Dashboard system to address the identified concerns (D001)?

What are the specific functional and non-functional requirements (e.g., data volume, transaction rate, consistency model) that necessitate considering an alternative or "better" database solution for the Horizon Dashboard (D002)?

stakeholder.business_summary: The discussion centered on the Horizon Dashboard project, identifying critical needs to improve its performance and significantly enhance the user interface. Key areas that require immediate attention include setting clear project timelines, confirming budget availability, and deciding on a potential integration with our CRM system.
key_impact: Improve user satisfaction and adoption by enhancing the dashboard's visual design and responsiveness.
Ensure the project remains within financial limits and delivers on time, as budget and timeline details are still open.
Prepare for potential integration with our CRM system to streamline business processes, though the specifics are yet to be defined.
Enhance the overall reliability and future maintainability of the product through better quality assurance and documentation.
decisions_needing_alignment: Confirmation is needed on exploring or using a better database for improved project performance.
We need confirmation on the strategic decision to integrate the project with the CRM system.
Approval is required for increasing the scope and rigor of the project's testing process.
Confirmation is needed to implement improved documentation practices moving forward.
major_unresolved_questions: What are the firm timelines for the Horizon Dashboard project's completion and key milestones?
What is the confirmed budget allocated for this project, and what are the financial constraints?
Should we strategically plan to integrate the dashboard with our CRM system, and if so, what is the timeline and approach?
How will we specifically address the identified performance issues to ensure a smooth user experience?

review.reviewer_notes: All role outputs are consistent with the extracted decisions. Inferred decisions are correctly flagged as needing confirmation or presented as open questions across the views. No hallucinations, contradictions, or missing critical sections were found. The outputs are ready for publishing.

Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.
The UI needs to look nicer.
We all agreed the current design isn't great.
There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.
We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually
but we're not sure when or how.
Budget was mentioned briefly — it's a concern
The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.
We should probably document things better going forward.
